name: MIDDLESEX WATER CO
summary: Middlesex Water Company, incorporated in 1897, owns and operates regulated water utility and wastewater systems primarily in New Jersey and Delaware. It serves approximately 131,000 regulated customers across its Middlesex, Tidewater, and Pinelands systems. The company also operates water and wastewater systems under unregulated contracts for municipal and private clients, including the City of Perth Amboy, Borough of Avalon, and Borough of Highland Park, and offers home maintenance programs through a marketing agreement with HomeServe USA Corp.

products.name: Regulated Water Service
products.description: Water treatment, storage, and distribution for residential, commercial, industrial, and fire protection customers in New Jersey and Delaware.

products.name: Regulated Wastewater Service
products.description: Wastewater collection and treatment services provided by Pinelands Wastewater in Burlington County, New Jersey.

products.name: Contract Water and Wastewater Operations
products.description: Operation and maintenance of water and wastewater systems under contract for municipal and private clients in New Jersey and Delaware.

products.name: Home Maintenance Programs
products.description: Water and wastewater related home maintenance programs marketed to residential customers in New Jersey and Delaware via agreement with HomeServe USA Corp.

partnerships.description: Agreement for purchase of untreated surface water from the Delaware & Raritan Canal through November 30, 2048, averaging 27 mgd with peak up to 47 mgd.
Marketing agreement expiring 2031 for USA to offer residential home maintenance programs; USA receives fees for billing, cash collection, and administrative services.
Tidewater purchases approximately 75 million gallons of treated water annually from the City of Dover, Delaware.
